feedback.text: For far too long rich and greedy people have taken advantage of normal consumers in the digital world, and this has to end before they turn every product into profit driven mess. Our world is so dependent on these digital products and their usage, so I would like to see that all digital products, services and platforms are included in this initiative. This would include video games, movies, social media, medical services and so on. Lets ensure that next generations can still use any digital products in fair and safe manner, without external constraints.
